task:
Missing git user config causes CI commit failure

High Severity

The git commit --allow-empty executed via exec.Command will fail in CI or any environment without a globally configured user.name and user.email. Every other test in this codebase that creates commits either uses go-git with an explicit Author in CommitOptions, or sets git config user.name/user.email beforehand (as in test-harness.sh). This test is the only one that omits user configuration, making it environment-dependent and likely to fail in CI.
